innateAbility.name: Vampiric Spirit
innateAbility.description: Delays the death of Wraith King when killed.The King enters Wraith Form, granting himself bonus attack speed and bonus movement speed, with unobstructed movement, for a short duration.The current Wraith duration is then subtracted from the total respawn time once the King dies.

abilities.name: Wraithfire Blast
abilities.description: Sears an enemy unit with a spectral fire projectile that stuns and damages on hit, then slows and damages over time.

abilities.name: Bone Guard
abilities.description: The King can summon Skeletons to fight for him.

abilities.name: Mortal Strike
abilities.description: Passively deals critical damage on an attack with a cooldown.

abilities.name: Reincarnation
abilities.description: The Wraith King reforms after death, allowing him to resurrect when killed in battle.Applies a movement speed slow and an attack speed slow upon death to enemy heroes within the radius when off-cooldown.
